case_title: EDUARDO NAGUIT VS. ANTONIO D VILLAFUERTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGUIT, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAGUIT, EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1319-1/2 MINNA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA 94103, COUNTY OF SF, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGUIT, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGUIT, EDUARDO SERVED AUG-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $64.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAGUIT, EDUARDO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFUERTE, ANTONIO D
